rawResponse: {"zh":"我觉得那位玩家和另一位玩家都很可疑，另一位玩家昨天的票型也有问题，今天建议先集中投他们。","en":"I think that player and the other player are both acting suspicious, and the other player voted strangely yesterday, so the village should focus its vote on those seats today."}
